calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. A CORPORATION HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

The Claim of Exemption by Amy McDougall, spouse of Judgment Debtor Rene Peinado, is GRANTED.

McDougall made a prima facie showing that the funds at issue are exempt as spousal separate property and Judgment Creditor The National Collection Agency, Inc. did not submit evidence demonstrating or otherwise show the funds at issue are community property or otherwise not exempt. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 703.020, 703.080; see also Family Code sections 770.911(a), 1500, 1612.)

Court will prepare order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. A CORPORATION HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The hearing on Third Party Amy Ellen McDougall's Claim of Exemption is CONTINUED TO MAY 21, 2025.

No later than April 24, 2025, Claimant McDougall may file a memorandum of points and authorities and supporting admissible evidence analyzing the relevant law and applying it to facts properly before the court. No later than May 1, 2025, Judgment Creditor the National Collection Agency, Inc. may file an opposition brief and supporting admissible evidence. No later than May 8, 2025, Claimant McDougall may file a reply. Filing parties must deliver to this Department a courtesy copy of any filing within 24 hours of the filing. The failure to timely provide courtesy copies may result in delay or an order taking the claim off calendar.

Claimant McDougall shall forthwith lodge a proposed order with the above text and shall promptly serve the executed order on all parties entitled to notice.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Ntc Of Mtn By Judgment Creditor For An Assignment Order
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
